commit.message:
fix: prevent grouping consecutive code blocks with the same language (#667)

* fix: prevent grouping consecutive code blocks with the same language

Two consecutive code blocks with the same language (e.g., both `mjs`)
were incorrectly grouped into a CJS/MJS switchable tab. Add a check
to ensure the two code blocks have different languages before creating
a switchable code tab.

Refs: https://github.com/nodejs/node/pull/62181

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: add optional chaining for defensive null safety

* fix: update to assume [0] and [1] always exist

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix falsy enum values returning None instead of name

AlarmReason.NO_ALARM has value 0, making it falsy in Python. The
_enum_to_lowercase function used 'if enum_value' which incorrectly
returned None for NO_ALARM. Changed to 'if enum_value is not None'
to properly handle zero-valued Flag enums.

This caused battery_monitor alarm and dc_energy_meter alarm to show
as 'unknown' instead of 'no_alarm' in Home Assistant.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add one-click install operators and fix Quick Reference button

Problem 2: Replace broken wm.url_open Quick Reference button (which tried
to open a non-existent local file in a browser) with fo4.show_quick_reference
operator that prints an FO4 modding cheat-sheet to sys.stdout and reports
a summary to Blender's Info bar.

Problem 3: Add one-click install buttons for all external AI tools.

tool_installers.py:
- install_shap_e(), install_point_e(), install_diffusers()
- install_libigl(), install_zoedepth(), install_hunyuan3d()
- install_hymotion(), install_motion_diffuse(), install_rignet()
Each follows the existing _pip_install / _pip_install_with_index pattern
and git-clones repos where needed.

operators.py:
- FO4_OT_InstallShapE, FO4_OT_InstallPointE, FO4_OT_InstallDiffusers
- FO4_OT_InstallLibigl, FO4_OT_InstallZoeDepth, FO4_OT_InstallHunyuan3D
- FO4_OT_InstallHyMotion, FO4_OT_InstallMotionGeneration, FO4_OT_InstallRigNet
- FO4_OT_ShowQuickReference
All use daemon threading pattern identical to FO4_OT_InstallUpscalerDeps.
All registered in the classes tuple.

ui_panels.py:
- Quick Reference: wm.url_open → fo4.show_quick_reference (icon='TEXT')
- Shap-E: add fo4.install_shap_e button in not-installed branch
- Point-E: add fo4.install_point_e button in not-installed branch
- HY-Motion: add fo4.install_hymotion in not-installed branch
- Motion Generation: add fo4.install_motion_generation button
- RigNet: add fo4.install_rignet after not-installed label
- libigl: add fo4.install_libigl after not-installed label
- ZoeDepth: add fo4.install_zoedepth before info button
- Hunyuan3D: add fo4.install_hunyuan3d before info button
- Diffusers: add fo4.install_diffusers before check button
All install icons use icon='IMPORT' (valid in Blender 5.0).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add AC charger (smart charger) support

Add support for AcCharger device type (BLE record type 0x08), which
covers Blue Smart IP22/IP65, Phoenix Smart IP43, and other Victron
AC charger models.

New sensor keys: AC_CURRENT, OUTPUT_VOLTAGE_1-3, OUTPUT_CURRENT_1-3.
Existing keys reused: CHARGE_STATE, CHARGER_ERROR, TEMPERATURE.

Also adds snapshot tests for all 8 supported device types.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Update to .NET 10 SDK with workload version set pinning (#3514)

Upgrade SkiaSharp from .NET 8 SDK to .NET 10 SDK with comprehensive build system,
CI pipeline, TFM architecture, and workload management changes.

TFM Architecture:
- Restructured from Previous/Current/Next to Base/Previous/Current
- TFMBase=net6.0 (class libraries), TFMPrevious=net9.0, TFMCurrent=net10.0
- Dropped TFMNext (platform TFMs only support 2 versions at once)
- Added Previous TPVs for all platforms alongside Current TPVs

SDK & Tooling:
- global.json: SDK 8.0.100 -> 10.0.100, rollForward latestMinor -> latestFeature
- latestFeature allows any 10.0.xxx feature band across heterogeneous CI agents
- .NET SDK pipeline variable: 8.0.304 -> 10.0.103
- Xcode: 15.4 -> 26.2 (managed), 15.4 -> 16.2 (native)
- Docker images: dotnet/sdk:8.0 -> dotnet/sdk:10.0
- Emscripten: 3.1.34 -> 3.1.56
- macOS agents: macos-14 -> macos-15
- Android tests moved from macOS to Linux agents

Workload Management:
- Replaced ad-hoc manifest mode with deterministic workload version set pinning
- Official workloads install with 'dotnet workload install --version 10.0.104'
- Tizen installs separately (not part of official workload sets)
- Removed DOTNET_VERSION_PREVIEW, DOTNET_WORKLOAD_SOURCE, installPreviewVs
- Removed manifest mode workarounds (--skip-manifest-update)

Platform Versions (Previous / Current):
- Android: 35.0 / 36.0
- iOS: 18.0 / 26.2
- Mac Catalyst: 18.0 / 26.2
- tvOS: 18.0 / 26.2
- macOS: 15.0 / 26.2
- Tizen: 8.0 / 10.0

Package Updates:
- xunit: 2.4.2 -> 2.9.3
- xharness CLI: 9.0.0-prerelease.24317.3 -> 11.0.0-prerelease.26107.1
- DeviceRunners: 0.1.0-preview.1 -> 0.1.0-preview.6
- TypeScript MSBuild: 5.7.1 -> 5.9.3
- Uno.Sdk: 5.2.175 -> 6.5.31

Blazor TypeScript Fix:
- Replaced TypeScriptCompileBlocked with per-TFM TypeScriptOutDir to fix
   multi-TFM parallel build race condition on shared wwwroot/*.js files

CI Cleanup:
- Removed old NuGet feeds (dotnet6/7/8, test-device-runners) from nuget.config
- Fixed Android emulator XDG path mismatch on Linux via ANDROID_AVD_HOME
- Added ANDROID_PLATFORM_VERSIONS: 21,35,36

Samples:
- MAUI: Removed Tizen platform folder, removed UseMauiCompatibility
- Uno: Updated to 6.5, migrated to UnoPlatformHostBuilder
- All: Updated TFMs and SupportedOSPlatformVersion minimums

Documentation:
- New: documentation/updating-dotnet-version.md for future upgrades

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: SkiaSharp
repository.description: SkiaSharp is a cross-platform 2D graphics API for .NET platforms based on Google's Skia Graphics Library. It provides a comprehensive 2D API that can be used across mobile, server and desktop models to render images.

commit.message:
fix: isolate sub-agent output from main chat and render in card

Sub-agent assistant text and reasoning were leaking into the main chat
transcript. Route sub-agent streaming deltas and final messages into
per-subagent accumulators keyed by tool call ID, using ParentToolCallId
from the SDK with state-based fallback. Persist transcript/reasoning in
the sub-agent payload JSON for rebuild, and update SubagentToolCallItem
directly via TranscriptBuilder for immediate UI visibility inside the
expandable sub-agent card.

Files changed:
- ChatViewModel.SessionLifecycle.cs: sub-agent stream routing and state
- ChatViewModel.cs: BuildSubagentPayloadJson transcript/reasoning fields
- TranscriptBuilder.cs: UpdateSubagentTranscript/ReasoningText methods
- TranscriptItems.cs: TranscriptText/ReasoningText properties on card
- TranscriptPaging.cs: weight estimation for sub-agent card content
- ChatView.axaml: render reasoning + transcript inside sub-agent card
- ChatView.axaml.cs: treat active sub-agent cards as streaming content

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(recall): add WITH clause between YIELD and WHERE for KuzuDB compatibility

KuzuDB's CALL...YIELD syntax does not support a WHERE clause directly
after YIELD. A WITH clause must be inserted between YIELD and WHERE.

Fixes scoped recall queries for both vector (QUERY_VECTOR_INDEX) and
full-text (QUERY_FTS_INDEX) search paths.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: neo-memory-mcp

commit.message:
Enhance CDC analyzer: reconvergence, FIFO, gray-code, MTBF, protocols

Add 7 new capabilities to bring CDC coverage from ~40% to ~80%:

- detect_reconvergence(): multi-path CDC glitch-prone path analysis
- verify_fifos(): FIFO structural verification (gray ptrs, sync depth, flags)
- check_gray_coding(): multi-bit CDC signal gray-code property check
- compute_mtbf(): metastability MTBF calculation with risk classification
- verify_protocols(): req-ack/handshake/pulse CDC protocol checking
- identify_synchronizers(): synchronizer chain detection and characterization
- run_enhanced(): full enhanced CDC flow combining all analyses

All existing code preserved. Helper methods added: find_paths_between,
check_single_bit_transition, count_sync_stages.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Enhance DRC engine with via enclosure, density uniformity, off-grid, antenna per-layer, min-area, waiver system, and rule deck parser

Add 8 new capabilities to DrcEngine:
- Via enclosure checking (metal above/below enclosure measurement)
- Window-based density uniformity (sliding window metal density)
- Off-grid coordinate checking (manufacturing grid alignment)
- Per-layer antenna ratio with cumulative ratio support
- Enhanced minimum area rules
- Soft DRC waiver system (region-based violation suppression)
- Calibre-like rule deck parser (SPACING/WIDTH/ENCLOSURE/DENSITY/GRID/ANTENNA/MINAREA)
- run_enhanced() combining all existing + new checks with waiver filtering

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Record VST crackle investigation notes

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Enhance Floorplanner with B*-tree representation and simulated annealing

Add B*-tree non-slicing floorplan representation with contour-based packing
(BStarNode, BStarTree, BStarTree::pack). Implement SA-based floorplanning
(floorplan_sa) with Metropolis acceptance criterion and configurable SAConfig.

New features:
- B*-tree packing with contour line maintenance (DFS traversal)
- SA perturbation moves: swap, rotate, move-subtree, channel resize
- Weighted cost function: area + HPWL wirelength + aspect ratio penalty
- Pin-aware orientation support (set_pin_positions)
- Half-perimeter wirelength estimation (estimate_wirelength)
- Aspect ratio control with configurable target and max bounds
- Enhanced FloorplanResult with SA statistics and rotation tracking

Existing solve() method and all tests remain backward compatible.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Scribe: OB-Xd VST3 bridge integration session complete

- Orchestration logs: Spike (architecture), Jet (deployment), Faye (host diagnostics), Ed (verification), Coordinator (integration)
- Session log: Final bridge message-pump refactor validated
- Decision inbox merged: 6 entries covering IPlugFrame fix, versioned deployment, thread affinity root cause
- Cross-agent history updated: Team learnings documented
- Archive check: decisions.md at 152KB, entries all recent (no archiving needed)

Architectural invariant locked:
> The bridge main thread is the UI/STA thread. All window creation, COM operations, plugin loads, and IPlugView calls happen on this thread. Pipe reader is background thread only.

Validation complete:
✅ Shipped Debug bridge byte-matches rebuilt Release bridge
✅ load_ack succeeds; openEditor successfully calls attached() without deadlock
✅ OB-Xd editor incomplete UI confirmed as plugin-side (beyond minimal host scope)
✅ Versioned deployment + manifest working end-to-end
⚠️ Test coverage gap flagged: 0 automated tests currently cover VST3/UI behavior

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
